response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical expertise, extensive open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse tech environments, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and formal project management — critical for this role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Proven full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and AI-agent systems
Strong track record in DevOps, CI/CD, and mentoring through workshops and team initiatives
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, architectural design, or formal requirements management experience
Lacks documented experience in client-facing technical advisory or IT security/compliance leadership
